channel.title: Veille métier du 2026-04-01
channel.description: Veille quotidienne assurance, finance, banque et régulation.

item.title: EIOPA report shows overall positive net returns, although the wide variation amongst products underscores the importance of target markets
item.description: The report provides an overview of the past performance and costs of insurance-based investment products, based on a sample of almost 6,000 insurance products from 175 undertakings representing over 60% of the unit-linked and profit participation premium in the European Economic Area (EEA). — Thématique assurance ; source jugée fiable (eiopa media) ; impact marché.

item.title: Piero Cipollone: The digital euro in a fragmenting world: ensuring Europe’s resilience and autonomy in payments
item.description: The European Central Bank (ECB) is the central bank of the European Union countries which have adopted the euro. Our main task is to maintain price stability in the euro area and so preserve the purchasing power of the single currency. — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (european central bank) ; information très récente.

item.title: Un préjudice estimé à plus de 360.000 euros : à Nice, une infirmière libérale renvoyée devant le tribunal pour une fraude présumée à la Caisse primaire d’assurance maladie - Nice-Matin
